name: Corn Pancakes (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the buttermilk and corn oil together in a bowl.
2. Add the cornmeal and steep the mixture for 15 minutes while preparing the other ingredients.
3. Sift the all-purpose flour with baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. In a large bowl, combine minced red bell pepper, thawed frozen corn kernels, egg yolks, scallion, and freshly ground black pepper.
5. Once the buttermilk and cornmeal mixture is ready, add it to the bell pepper, corn, and scallion mixture, stirring well.
6. Whip the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
7. Preheat the griddle or skillet.
8. Gradually fold the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients, adding more buttermilk if needed, and mix in the egg whites.
9. Drop about 1/4 cup of batter onto the heated griddle and cook for approximately 2 to 3 minutes per side.
10. Serve with ham steaks.
Yield: 4 servings
